message:
Improve CI/CD with parallel browser matrix for E2E tests

- Split e2e job into e2e-cli and e2e-web jobs for faster feedback
- Run web E2E tests in parallel across chromium, firefox, webkit
- Update coverage merge script to handle multiple coverage sources
- Update search copy E2E test with new assertions
- Regenerate sitemap with current prompts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: CLI typecheck
         run: bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
 
-  e2e:
+  e2e-cli:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: [build]
     steps:
@@ -97,17 +97,32 @@ jobs:
           bun-version: latest
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
       - name: Run CLI E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e:cli
-      - name: Run Web E2E tests
-        run: bun run test:e2e:web
+
+  e2e-web:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [build]
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        project: [chromium, firefox, webkit]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps ${{ matrix.project }}
+      - name: Run Web E2E tests (${{ matrix.project }})
+        run: bun run test:e2e:web -- --project ${{ matrix.project }}
       - name: Upload test artifacts on failure
         if: failure()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: e2e-test-artifacts
+          name: e2e-test-artifacts-${{ matrix.project }}
           path: |
             test-results/
             playwright-report/

@@ -48,16 +48,32 @@ jobs:
         run: bun run build
 
       # E2E test gates
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
       - name: Run CLI E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e:cli
-      - name: Run Web E2E tests
-        run: bun run test:e2e:web
+
+  pre-release-e2e-web:
+    name: Pre-Release Web E2E (${{ matrix.project }})
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: pre-release-tests
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        project: [chromium, firefox, webkit]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps ${{ matrix.project }}
+      - name: Run Web E2E tests (${{ matrix.project }})
+        run: bun run test:e2e:web -- --project ${{ matrix.project }}
 
   build:
     name: Build (${{ matrix.target }})
-    needs: pre-release-tests
+    needs: [pre-release-tests, pre-release-e2e-web]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
